claim_boundary: Sanitized aggregate matrix only. Raw provider responses and run artifacts remain in ignored local results directories unless separately scrubbed and intentionally released.

rows.finding: Schema-clean tool calls, but semantic tool/priority decisions failed on 3/8 cases.
rows.product_interpretation: Valid JSON/tool-call arguments are not sufficient for correct agent behavior; MBS catches schema-clean semantic decision errors.

rows.finding: Format/schema failure mode under this hard nested tool-call contract.
rows.product_interpretation: MBS separates structure/format failures from semantic decision failures and keeps the run infra-clean.

rows.finding: Schema-clean tool calls, but semantic decisions failed on 5/8 cases.
rows.product_interpretation: Smaller/cheaper deployments may produce clean structure while still choosing wrong tools or priorities.

non_claims: This summary does not claim broad provider reliability.
This summary does not claim any listed deployment passed the provider gate.
This summary does not publish raw provider responses.
This summary does not mix fixture evidence with provider behavior evidence.
